name: SILKEN OUD
description: A deep, resonant oud enveloped in layers of soft cashmeran and golden saffron. This is the embodiment of quiet power—a fragrance that doesn't demand attention, but effortlessly commands it. Wear it when the night calls for mystery.

name: NOIR ABSOLU
description: The essence of a midnight rendezvous. Noir Absolu blends smoky vetiver with the unexpected sweetness of black fig. It is a study in contrasts—dark yet illuminating, sharp yet infinitely smooth. For those who thrive in the shadows.
